remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, delete every annotation in the document, and save the cleaned PDF to a new file.

delete-all-annotations-from-pdfs.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
delete-all-annotations-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory, bind each with PdfAnnotationEditor, remove every annotation, and overwrite the original file.

delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.title: Delete Text Annotations from PDF
delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, remove only text annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the cleaned document.

remove-link-annotations-from-specific-pd.title: Remove Link Annotations from Specific PDF Pages
remove-link-annotations-from-specific-pd.description: Shows how to delete all Link annotations on pages 3 through 7 of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

delete-specific-annotation.title: Delete a Specific Annotation from PDF
delete-specific-annotation.description: Shows how to remove a single annotation identified by its name from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

delete-annotation-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name
delete-annotation-by-name.description: Demonstrates how to remove a PDF annotation whose Name (ID) is stored in a variable using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotation, with optional creation of a sample PDF.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to export all annotations from a PDF document to an XFDF file using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

export-annotations-to-xfdf-stream.title: Export Annotations from Selected PDF Pages to XFDF Stream
export-annotations-to-xfdf-stream.description: Shows how to extract annotations from pages 1‑2 of a PDF and export them to an XFDF memory stream using Aspose.Pdf.

export-highlight-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Highlight Annotations to XFDF
export-highlight-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to filter PDF annotations by the Highlight type and export them to an XFDF file using the PdfAnnotationEditor overload.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF document, import annotations from an XFDF file using PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the updated PDF.

import-xfdf-annotations-with-page-range.title: Import XFDF Annotations with Page‑Range Filtering
import-xfdf-annotations-with-page-range.description: Shows how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then restrict them to a specific page range by flattening annotations outside that range.

import-annotations-without-overwrite.title: Import Annotations Without Overwriting Existing Ones
import-annotations-without-overwrite.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from one or more source PDFs into a target PDF while preserving the original annotations by disabling the overwrite option.

flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Non‑Editable Content
flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor and save the flattened document.

flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five PDF Pages
flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations on pages 1‑5 of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

modify-annotation-author-on-pdf-page.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific PDF Page
modify-annotation-author-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace the author of annotations on a given PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

modify-annotation-subject-color.title: Modify Annotation Subject and Color
modify-annotation-subject-color.description: Demonstrates how to change the subject and color of an existing PDF annotation by creating a template TextAnnotation and applying it with PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

set-annotation-open-flag.title: Set Annotation Open Flag for All PDF Annotations
set-annotation-open-flag.description: Iterates through each page and annotation in a PDF, setting the Open property of TextAnnotation and PopupAnnotation to true, then saves the modified document.

update-annotation-modified-date.title: Update Annotation Modified Date to Current Time
update-annotation-modified-date.description: Demonstrates how to set the Modified property of PDF annotations to the current system time using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor and then save the updated document.

apply-read-only-flag-to-pdf-annotations.title: Apply Read‑Only Flag to PDF Annotations
apply-read-only-flag-to-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to set the ReadOnly flag on a TextAnnotation and apply it to all pages of a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.

batch-update-annotation-author.title: Batch Update Annotation Author Across PDFs
batch-update-annotation-author.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory and use PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotationsAuthor to replace the author of all annotations in each document.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with a MemoryStream, export all its annotations to XFDF, and return the XFDF data as a byte array.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to bind a PDF stream to PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from an XFDF stream, and save the modified PDF to a memory stream without using temporary files.

delete-flatten-annotations-pdf.title: Delete and Flatten Annotations in PDF
delete-flatten-annotations-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, removing all annotations, flattening any remaining ones, and saving the processed document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

validate-xfdf-against-schema.title: Validate XFDF File Against XFDF Schema
validate-xfdf-against-schema.description: Shows how to load an exported XFDF file and validate it against the XFDF XSD schema using XmlReaderSettings, while referencing the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

count-annotations-before-after-deletion.title: Count Annotations Before and After Deletion
count-annotations-before-after-deletion.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, count its annotations, delete all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and verify the removal by recounting.

extract-pdf-annotation-details.title: Extract PDF Annotation Details to Custom Objects
extract-pdf-annotation-details.description: Demonstrates how to read all annotations from a PDF, map their name, type, and rectangle into a custom C# class, and display the extracted information.

extract-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Write Audit Log as JSON
extract-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, maps them to a DTO, and writes the data to a formatted JSON audit log.

delete-pdf-annotation-with-error-handlin.title: Delete PDF Annotation with Error Handling
delete-pdf-annotation-with-error-handlin.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and gracefully handle the case where the annotation does not exist.

delete-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Author Name
delete-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Shows how to filter PDF annotations by the author's title and remove them using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

delete-annotations-by-color.title: Delete Annotations by Color in PDF
delete-annotations-by-color.description: Shows how to remove PDF annotations whose Color property matches a specific RGB value using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

export-pdf-annotations-xfdf-import.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Import into Another PDF
export-pdf-annotations-xfdf-import.description: The example shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import that XFDF into a target PDF, reproducing the original annotation layout.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations in a Folder
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a directory, flatten their annotations with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the output files with a "_flattened" suffix.

batch-delete-stamp-annotations.title: Batch Delete Stamp Annotations from PDFs
batch-delete-stamp-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a folder and remove all stamp annotations using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Demonstrates how to import a single XFDF file containing reviewer comments and apply the same annotations to several PDF documents, saving the annotated versions to an output folder.

parallel-delete-pdf-annotations.title: Parallel Deletion of PDF Annotations
parallel-delete-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor with Parallel.ForEach to remove all annotations from a large set of PDFs concurrently and save the cleaned files.

measure-annotation-flattening-time.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Measure Execution Time
measure-annotation-flattening-time.description: Loads a PDF, flattens all its annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, measures the time taken with Stopwatch, and saves the flattened document.

list-annotation-names-pdf.title: List Annotation Names in PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
list-annotation-names-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, iterate through each page, and print the Name of every annotation. Includes a helper that creates a sample PDF with a text annotation if the file is missing.

delete-annotations-with-pdfannotationedi.title: Delete All Annotations from a PDF Using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-annotations-with-pdfannotationedi.description: The example creates a PDF with several text annotations, then uses PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations to remove them and verifies the result with a unit test.

retry-delete-pdf-annotation.title: Retry Deleting PDF Annotation with PdfAnnotationEditor
retry-delete-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, delete a specific annotation, and implement a simple retry mechanism if the first attempt fails.

log-pdf-annotation-deletions.title: Log PDF Annotation Deletions to CSV
log-pdf-annotation-deletions.description: Shows how to enumerate all annotations in a PDF, write their name, type, and page number to a CSV log, delete the annotations, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-annotations-from-config.title: Delete Specific PDF Annotations Using a Configuration File
delete-pdf-annotations-from-config.description: Shows how to read a JSON file that lists annotation types and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete those annotations from a PDF and save the modified document.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF, delete every annotation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the cleaned document via a console application.

batch-delete-pdf-annotations-progress.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations with Progress Indicator
batch-delete-pdf-annotations-progress.description: Demonstrates how to remove all annotations from multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and shows a console progress bar indicating the percentage of files processed.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-cancellati.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Cancellation Support
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-cancellati.description: Demonstrates how to flatten annotations in multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with asynchronous batch processing and cancellation token handling.

get-annotation-names-by-author.title: Get Annotation Names by Author
get-annotation-names-by-author.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all annotations, and return the names of those whose author (stored in the Subject of a markup annotation) matches a specified string.

copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Copy Annotations from Template PDF to Multiple PDFs
copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to export annotations from a template PDF to an in‑memory XFDF stream and import them into each PDF in a folder, saving annotated copies.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verify.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-verify.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then validate that no annotation objects remain in the resulting document.

batch-remove-annotations-report.title: Batch Remove Annotations from PDFs and Generate Report
batch-remove-annotations-report.description: The example iterates through PDF files, counts existing annotations on each page, removes all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the cleaned PDFs, and creates a summary report of annotations removed per file.

pdf-annotation-helper.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Binding, Deleting, Flattening, and Saving
pdf-annotation-helper.description: Demonstrates a reusable C# helper that wraps Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to bind a PDF, delete annotations (all or by type), flatten them, and save the modified document.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v3.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v3.description: Shows how to bind a PDF stream to PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document back to a stream or file.

async-pdf-annotation-operations.title: Asynchronous PDF Annotation Operations with Aspose.Pdf
async-pdf-annotation-operations.description: Demonstrates how to perform common PDF annotation tasks—flattening, deleting, importing, and exporting—using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor wrapped in Task.Run for non‑blocking asynchronous execution.

delete-pdf-annotations-in-folder.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
delete-pdf-annotations-in-folder.description: Shows how to scan a directory for PDF files and remove every annotation from each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, with optional output to a separate folder.

update-annotation-modified-timestamp.title: Update Annotation Modified Timestamp in PDF
update-annotation-modified-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade to set the Modified property on existing annotations across all pages of a PDF, enabling tracking of when each annotation was last changed.

pdf-annotation-deletion-tool.title: PDF Annotation Deletion Tool (WinForms)
pdf-annotation-deletion-tool.description: Shows a WinForms GUI that opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, lists distinct annotation types, lets the user select types to delete, and saves the modified document.

backup-pdf-delete-annotations.title: Backup PDF and Delete All Annotations
backup-pdf-delete-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to create a backup copy of a PDF file and then remove all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name
delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.description: Demonstrates removing a named annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, with both a string literal and a variable holding the annotation name.

benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.title: Benchmark DeleteAnnotations vs DeleteAnnotation
benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.description: Demonstrates how to measure and compare the performance of removing all annotations with DeleteAnnotations and removing a single annotation with DeleteAnnotation using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and log the original and reduced file sizes for audit purposes.

extract-annotation-rectangles-to-pdf.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles and Visualize as PDF Pages
extract-annotation-rectangles-to-pdf.description: The example extracts every annotation from a source PDF, retrieves each annotation's rectangle, and creates a new PDF where each rectangle is drawn on its own page for visual inspection.

add-custom-annotation-flags-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Annotation Flags to PDF Pages
add-custom-annotation-flags-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextAnnotation, set custom annotation flags, and apply it to all pages of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

flatten-pdf-annotations-nightly.title: Flatten PDF Annotations on a Network Share
flatten-pdf-annotations-nightly.description: Demonstrates how to scan a network share for PDF files, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, and overwrite the originals, suitable for nightly scheduling.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verify__v2.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-verify__v2.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then confirm that no annotation objects remain by scanning each page's annotation collection.

export-pdf-annotations-pretty-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-pretty-xfdf.description: Shows how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and save the XML with indentation for easier manual editing.

pdf-annotation-helper__v2.title: Simplified PDF Annotation Helper
pdf-annotation-helper__v2.description: Shows a wrapper class that abstracts Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, offering concise methods to delete, export, import, modify, redact, and save PDF annotations.

pdf-annotation-operations-cli.title: PDF Annotation Operations (Delete, Flatten, Export)
pdf-annotation-operations-cli.description: A command‑line utility that demonstrates how to delete pages, flatten all annotations, and export annotations to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-annotations-no-annotations-xfdf.title: Export Annotations to XFDF When No Annotations Exist
export-annotations-no-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations from a PDF to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf when the document has no annotations and validates the generated XFDF structure.

merge-multiple-xfdf-files-into-pdf.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files and Import into PDF
merge-multiple-xfdf-files-into-pdf.description: Shows how to combine several XFDF annotation files into a single XFDF document and import the merged data into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

annotation-diagnostic-workflow.title: Diagnostic Annotation Workflow with Verbose Logging
annotation-diagnostic-workflow.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a text annotation, exporting annotations to XFDF, and saving the document while logging each step to a detailed log file.

get-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.title: Get Annotation Count Per PDF Page
get-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to count the total number of annotations on each page of a PDF document and return the results in a dictionary.

clone-modify-pdf-annotation.title: Clone and Modify a PDF Annotation with Aspose.Pdf
clone-modify-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to clone the first TextAnnotation on a specified page, change its properties, and add the cloned annotation back to the same page using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into Matching PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDFs, locate matching XFDF files by name, and import the annotations into each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

concurrent-import-delete-pdf.title: Concurrent Import and Delete Operations on PDF
concurrent-import-delete-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to run page import and page delete operations on the same PDF concurrently using multiple threads to test thread safety.

backup-pdf-before-flattening.title: Backup PDF and Flatten Form Fields
backup-pdf-before-flattening.description: Demonstrates creating a backup copy of a PDF file and then flattening all form fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

count-pdf-annotation-types.title: Count PDF Annotation Types
count-pdf-annotation-types.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF and count the number of occurrences for each annotation type using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

flatten-pdf-annotations-skip-readonly.title: Flatten PDF Annotations with Option to Skip Read‑Only
flatten-pdf-annotations-skip-readonly.description: Demonstrates batch processing of PDF files to flatten all annotations while optionally skipping those marked as read‑only via a configuration flag.

log-annotation-operation-durations.title: Log Annotation Operation Durations in PDF
log-annotation-operation-durations.description: Demonstrates how to measure and log the execution time of PDF annotation operations such as delete, create, and flatten using Aspose.Pdf and a Stopwatch.

delete-annotations-export-xfdf.title: Delete Specific Annotations and Export Remaining to XFDF
delete-annotations-export-xfdf.description: Shows how to remove all annotations of a given type from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then export the remaining annotations to an XFDF file.

retry-annotation-modification-exponentia.title: Retry Annotation Modification with Exponential Backoff
retry-annotation-modification-exponentia.description: Demonstrates modifying PDF annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor and applying an exponential back‑off retry policy to handle transient I/O errors such as file sharing violations.

export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: Export PDF Annotations to CSV
export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts each annotation's name and its page number, and writes the information to a CSV file.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf-annotation.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF Annotation
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf-annotation.description: Shows how to create a text annotation, embed custom metadata (as JSON) in its dictionary via the Subject field, and apply the changes using PdfAnnotationEditor.

remove-old-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Old Annotations from PDF
remove-old-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, identify annotations older than a given number of days, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf before saving the cleaned document.

check-duplicate-annotation-names.title: Check for Duplicate Annotation Names in PDF
check-duplicate-annotation-names.description: Opens a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, counts annotation names, and logs any duplicate names found.

extract-pdf-annotation-comments-summary.title: Extract PDF Annotation Comments and Create Summary PDF
extract-pdf-annotation-comments-summary.description: Demonstrates how to extract all annotation comments from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade and compile them into a new PDF document that serves as a summary.

flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Static Graphics
flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.description: Demonstrates flattening all annotations in a PDF while preserving their visual appearance by converting them to static graphics using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

merge-pdf-annotation-layers.title: Merge PDF Annotation Layers into a Single PDF
merge-pdf-annotation-layers.description: Shows how to load a base PDF, import annotation layers from multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the merged result.

verify-pdfannotationeditor-binding.title: Verify PdfAnnotationEditor Binding to PDF
verify-pdfannotationeditor-binding.description: Shows a health check that binds a PdfAnnotationEditor to a sample PDF, confirms the document is loaded with pages, and reports any errors.

batch-export-delete-archive-pdf-annotati.title: Batch Export, Delete, and Archive PDF Annotations to XFDF
batch-export-delete-archive-pdf-annotati.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDFs, export all annotations to XFDF files, delete the annotations from the PDFs, and save the cleaned documents while archiving the XFDF files.

flatten-pdfs-save-to-custom-output-direc.title: Flatten PDFs and Save to Custom Output Directory
flatten-pdfs-save-to-custom-output-direc.description: Loads each PDF from an input folder, flattens form fields, and saves the flattened file to a specified output folder while preserving the original file name.

log-file-sizes-after-flattening-pdf-anno.title: Log File Sizes After Flattening PDF Annotations
log-file-sizes-after-flattening-pdf-anno.description: The example loads a PDF, records its original size, flattens all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the flattened document, and logs the new file size to provide an audit trail.

update-annotation-subject-using-pdfannot.title: Update Annotation Subject Using PdfAnnotationEditor
update-annotation-subject-using-pdfannot.description: Creates a PDF with a text annotation, then uses PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations to change the annotation's Subject property and verifies the update with a unit test.

batch-annotation-deletion-retain-types.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations While Retaining Specified Types
batch-annotation-deletion-retain-types.description: Shows how to delete all annotations from a PDF except those listed in a JSON configuration file, using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from a Stream
flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades directly from an input stream and return the modified document as a MemoryStream without any file system access.

flatten-pdf-add-custom-metadata.title: Flatten PDF and Tag with Flattening Date Metadata
flatten-pdf-add-custom-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all form fields in a PDF and then add a custom metadata entry that records the flattening date in ISO‑8601 UTC format.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-with-logg.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Diagnostic Logging
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-with-logg.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file using PdfAnnotationEditor and log the generated XFDF content with a timestamp.

clone-and-recolor-pdf-annotation.title: Clone and Recolor PDF Annotation
clone-and-recolor-pdf-annotation.description: Shows how to clone an existing annotation from one page, change its color, and add the cloned annotation to another page using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-text-annotation-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Text Annotation to PDFs from Azure Blob Storage
batch-add-text-annotation-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate PDF blobs in Azure Blob Storage, stream each into Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor, add a text annotation, and upload the modified PDF back to a container.

generate-annotation-summary-report.title: Generate Annotation Summary Report for PDF Files
generate-annotation-summary-report.description: Loads PDF documents with PdfAnnotationEditor, iterates through each page's annotations, counts them by AnnotationType, and outputs a summary report for each file.

conditional-pdf-flattening-based-on-digi.title: Conditional PDF Flattening Based on Digital Signatures
conditional-pdf-flattening-based-on-digi.description: The example checks if a PDF contains digital signatures and only flattens form fields when no signatures are present, preserving signature validity.

rename-pdf-annotation-names-with-prefix.title: Rename PDF Annotation Names with Standard Prefix
rename-pdf-annotation-names-with-prefix.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all pages and annotations in a PDF and rename each annotation using a standardized prefix via Aspose.Pdf facades.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verbose.title: Flatten PDF Annotations with Optional Verbose Logging
flatten-pdf-annotations-verbose.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, flatten all its annotations, and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with a command‑line flag to enable verbose logging for troubleshooting.

test-export-annotations-unbound-pdfannot.title: Test ExportAnnotations throws exception on unbound PdfAnnotationEditor
test-export-annotations-unbound-pdfannot.description: Demonstrates how to verify that calling ExportAnnotationsToXfdf on a PdfAnnotationEditor that hasn't been bound to a PDF document raises an exception.

generate-pdf-annotation-report-by-author.title: Generate PDF Annotation Report Grouped by Author
generate-pdf-annotation-report-by-author.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF, group them by the author (Title property of markup annotations), and write a simple text report using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-custom-na.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-custom-na.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF annotations to an XFDF file and replacing the default XFDF namespace with a custom one using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-annotation-flattener-service.title: Folder Watcher to Flatten PDF Annotations
pdf-annotation-flattener-service.description: Shows a background service that monitors a directory for new PDF files and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, saving the processed PDFs to an output folder.

validate-pdf-integrity-annotation-modifi.title: Validate PDF Integrity Using PdfAnnotationEditor
validate-pdf-integrity-annotation-modifi.description: Shows how to validate a PDF after annotation changes with Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade, generate a compliance log, and handle corrupted object exceptions.

export-annotations-to-xfdf-gzip.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Compress with GZip
export-annotations-to-xfdf-gzip.description: Demonstrates exporting all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF stream using PdfAnnotationEditor and then compressing the XFDF data with GZip for efficient storage.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-cleanup.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF and Delete Temporary File
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-cleanup.description: Demonstrates how to import form field values from an XFDF file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and then delete the temporary XFDF file after a successful import.
